customAttributes.description:
When Ichor Wellspring enters the battlefield or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.
A numbered series of 500 copies of this card was found within the The Brothers' War Collector Booster product. The number on the card you receive will vary from the number pictured in the listing unless otherwise shown in a Listing with Photo.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Should a single drop take hold, the oil begins to consume organic tissue and will multiply until it overwhelms the host." —Yawgmoth, collected writings

details.setName: The Brothers' War: Retro Frame Artifacts
details.setUrlName: The Brothers War Retro Frame Artifacts
